title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, CP0, Unknown person #3, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #4 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Dragon other than Kaido appeared right in front of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It definitely matches the devil fruit vegapunk made!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's fighting with "Straw hat" Luffy Against Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well it makes no difference to us... just let the pirates take each other out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the unlikely case that Kaido is defeated...

dialogue.speaker: CP0
dialogue.text: It's been decided that the world government...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...will Annex the Independent Land of Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ships are already on their way, but how likely is it that they'll be needed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's basically stooping to the Pirates' level...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Honestly, this skirmish has been gripping...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the odds of them actually beating Kaido...? I can't even picture it happening!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: It concerns the straw hat crew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: World government intelligence agent either polaigis zero Rob, LuCCI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Among Pirates cannot be under- stated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Praise like that will go straight to my head.)

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
